channel.name: Tools AI Online
channel.subject: Suggested Tools AI Online listing: Ralph Workflow

submitted_payload.suggested_entry: Ralph Workflow — free open-source workflow system for autonomous coding that composes planning, implementation, and verification into a reviewable repo-native flow.

why_this_action: Shared artifacts still show distribution_and_message_to_primary_repo_conversion as the live bottleneck. Reddit remains repetition-prone/high-risk, Apollo is already in a measurement window until 2026-05-30, and Tools AI Online exposes a strong directory audience plus a live editorial email fallback when the submit form is blocked by reCAPTCHA. That made it the strongest executable fresh distribution action available right now.
shared_findings_reused: MARKETING_WORKFLOW_PRINCIPLES.md: keep Codeberg primary and make the repo path explicit
FOUR_MARKETING_QUESTIONS.md: preserved what it is, who it is for, why different, and why now
ADOPTION_FUNNEL_NEXT.md: bias toward proof-led, free-use conversion instead of broad generic promotion
market_intelligence_latest.json: reused current positioning around autonomous coding reliability and reviewability
marketing_workflow_audit_latest.md: prioritize executable distribution over more planning
channel_discovery.json: tools-ai-online surface is CAPTCHA-blocked but exposes mailto fallback

verification.submit_surface_note: web submit requires reCAPTCHA and image upload; editorial email was the strongest legitimate path from this environment

measurement_window.success_signal: reply, live listing, or backlink/citation from Tools AI Online pointing evaluators to the Codeberg primary repo
measurement_window.kill_condition: If no reply or listing signal arrives by 2026-06-06, replace this lane with a different untouched curator/directory target instead of re-sending the same pitch.
